name: marketplace
description: A marketplace startup where both sides of the network start fragmenting. Decline comes fast after saturation. Hard difficulty — agent must act earlier than in SaaS scenarios.
data_sources: a16z 2022 — marketplace supply-side monthly churn avg 4.0%
Carta 2024 — marketplace seed burn $120-160K/mo (dual-sided CAC is expensive)
CustomerGauge 2025 — marketplace avg NPS 32 (always someone unhappy on one side)
OpenView 2023 — marketplace growth phase can reach 10%/mo when network effects fire
Benchmarkit 2024 — marketplace CAC payback avg 14 months (dual-sided acquisition)
CB Insights 2024 — 38% of marketplace failures due to chicken-and-egg liquidity

real_world_parallel.example: Shopify pivot from Snowdevil snowboard store to e-commerce platform (month 16, 11mo runway)

notes: Marketplace churn 4%/mo matches a16z supply-side data. Shorter runway (18mo) and faster phase transitions than SaaS. Network effects amplify both growth and decline. Agent must act earlier.
